feed.title: SAP Community - Software Logistics
feed.subtitle: Software Logistics Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Choosing the Right Automation Testing Tool for Mobile App Development
entry.content:
Hello fellow developers and testers,

I'm currently working on a mobile app development software project, and I'm in the process of selecting an automation testing tool software to streamline the testing process. There are so many options out there, and I'm a bit overwhelmed by the choices.

I'd love to hear from those of you with experience in this field. Can you please share your insights on the following:

  1. Which automation testing tools have you used for mobile app testing, and what were your experiences with them? Are there any standout features or limitations you'd like to highlight?

  2. What factors should I consider when choosing an automation testing tool for mobile apps? Are there specific criteria or best practices you follow when making this decision?

  3. Are there any open-source automation testing tools that you would recommend for mobile app testing? I'm interested in exploring both open-source and commercial options.

  4. Do you have any tips or resources for someone who is new to automation testing but wants to get started in mobile app testing efficiently?

Your insights will be greatly appreciated, as they will help me and others in the community make more informed decisions when it comes to automation testing tools for mobile app development. Thanks in advance for your input!

entry.title: Cannot open '/usr/sap//SYS/exe/uc/linuxx86_64/instance.lst': No such file or directory
entry.content:
Severe error(s) occurred in phase PREP_INPUT_CHECK/KX_CPYORG!

Last error code set:

Cannot open '/usr/sap/<SID>/SYS/exe/uc/linuxx86_64/instance.lst': No such file or

directory

Trouble Ticket Generation

A trouble ticket and an archive with all relevant log files have been generated.

Trouble ticket: "/usr/sap/install_<SID>/SUM/abap/log/SAPup_troubleticket.log"

Log archive: "/usr/sap/install_<SID>/SUM/abap/log/SAPup_troubleticket_logs.sar"

entry.title: Unattended Mode - Up-to-date installation possible ?
entry.content:
Hello,

I plan to use the unattended mode of SWPM to install SAP Solution Manager 7.2.

I have a question regarding the installation process

Can I install an up-to-date system by using a stack.xml file generated by the Maintenance Planner to install the latest Support Package Stack? If this is possible, how can it be achieved? Do I simply need to include the SAPINST_STACK_XML option during the execution of SWPM, and will SWPM automatically invoke the SUM during the installation process?

entry.title: SUM not detecting the additinal app instance
entry.content:
we are on the process of ecc to s4hana conversion , we have central app instance in windows os and one additional app on linux os , in sum phase sum not detecting the  additional app instance on linux os
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Client export Ended with errors : error code 0006 ( Scrap Data )
entry.content:
We are working on doing client copy from production to Dev. Following Client Export and import methodology. 

During the Prod export process, we have encountered the following error in the log file:

 Transport control program tp ended with error code 0006
 Error exporting request TUPKT00033 01:12:38
 Program ended with error or warning, return code: F

 

2WETW206 scrap char 0x0000 found in RFRR.SRTFD. See note 718511 for details.
3WETW000 (SAP K04C�������� ################                           ). Entry "300RRSAP K04C�������� ################                           ###" not exported.
2WETW206 scrap char in NUMC field found in T512E.LFDNR. See note 718511 for details.
3WETW000   ). Entry "30007KK01/101RT     " not exported.

 

2WETW206 scrap char in NUMC field found in T884H.CODE.



The below SAP note says it is ok to use this export TR file and import in Dev system: Wanted to check what SAPs recommendation is? 
718511 - R3trans: Export error due to "scrap characters" 

Attaching the log file to the case. 
Also only 1 TR which got generated : TUPKT00033
The below TR is not generated during this export process
TUPKX00033" for transporting client-specific texts, provided texts are available in this client


System is open and the credentials are maintained in the secure area. 

Thanks,
Neeraj

entry.title: How to automatically retrieve the tax code on the item from the material master?
entry.content:
Hey,

I need to have a taxe code from MM so there's a way to automatically retrieve the tax code on the item from the material master

entry.title: After implementing SAP Note 3395784, Error 8 on TOC Create In ChaRM. Mismatched parameters in FM
entry.content: After implementing SAP Note 3395784, Error 8 on TOC Create In ChaRM. Mismatched parameters in FM CHANGEDOCUMENT_READ_ALL

entry.title: SAP on PaaS Cloud SQL di GCP
entry.content:
dear expert,

I need to know if is possible to migrate a SAP Microsoft SQL DATABASE to GCP Cloud SQL PaaS. Is it certified for SAP?
if so, is it possible to have a SAP NOTE that clarifies the steps to perform this or that certifies the feasibility of this data migration from a classic Microsoft SQL toGCP Cloud SQL PaaS?

regards, 





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP BW question
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

we would install an BW system.
we are evaluating if to install a SAP BW/4HANA system or a BW on PERSON_NAME system but we have a doubt:

It's possible to install HANA DB Instance on RHEL Linux OS and Application server Instance on Oracle Solaris 11.3 SPARC OS?

thanks and best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: MAIN_SWITCH/STARTSAP_TRANS System started failed
entry.content:
We are currently in running an SSM upgrade to SPS19 and getting this error in phase MAIN_SWITCH/STARTSAP_TRANS

hecks after phase MAIN_SWITCH/STARTSAP_TRANS were negative!

Last error code set:
Process /usr/sap/D98/DVEBMGS00/exe/sapcontrol exited with 2, see
'/sp_update/Update/SUM/abap/log/SAPup.ECO' for details
System start failed
Earlier, validating the profile failed, see INSTANCE.OU 

 

SAPup> Starting subprocess with PID 49137 in phase 'MOD_PFPAR_TRANS' at 20240731172135
ENV: DIR_LIBRARY=/usr/sap/D98/DVEBMGS00/exe
ENV: JAVA_HOME=/usr/sap/D98/DVEBMGS00/exe/sapjvm_4
ENV: LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/sap/D98/DVEBMGS00/exe:/usr/sap/D98/SYS/exe/run:/usr/sap/D98/SYS/exe/uc/linuxx86_64:/usr/sap/D98/hdbclient
ENV: PATH=/usr/sap/D98/DVEBMGS00/exe:/usr/sap/D98/DVEBMGS00/exe/sapjvm_4/bin:/home/d98adm/bin:/bin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/usr/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/games:/usr/sap/D98/SYS/exe/uc/linuxx86_64:/usr/sap/D98/SYS/exe/run:/home/d98adm:/usr/sap/D98/hdbclient
ENV: RSEC_SSFS_DATAPATH=/usr/sap/D98/SYS/global/security/rsecssfs/data
ENV: RSEC_SSFS_KEYPATH=/usr/sap/D98/SYS/global/security/rsecssfs/key
ENV: SAPSYSTEMNAME=D98
ENV: dbms_type=HDB
*DBENV: dbs_hdb_schema=SAPABAP1
ENV: rsdb_ssfs_connect=1
*DBENV: (auth_shadow_upgrade)
PWD: /sp_update/Update/SUM/abap/tmp

EXECUTING /usr/sap/D98/DVEBMGS00/exe/sappfpar check pf=/usr/sap/D98/SYS/profile/D98_DVEBMGS00_tdssolci1d


================================================
== Checking profile: /usr/sap/D98/SYS/profile/D98_DVEBMGS00_tdssolci1d
== SAP Release 753
== SAP Patch 1200
== System ID 390 (AMD/Intel x86_64 with Linux)
== ES Implementation std
================================================

Metadata Parameters Analysis
================================================
***WARNING: Parameter rspo/spool_id/use_tskh = 0
Parameter value out of range (1 3)

Parameters Redefinitions
================================================
***ERROR: zcsa/table_buffer_area defined 2 times in /usr/sap/D98/SYS/profile/D98_DVEBMGS00_tdssolci1d

Unknown and Obsolete Parameters
================================================
***WARNING: Unexpected parameter: GEN_PSW_MAX_LENGTH = 10
***WARNING: Unexpected parameter: abap/pxa_preload = 0
***WARNING: Unexpected parameter: rdisp/system_needs_spool = false
***WARNING: Unexpected parameter: rsdb/pmandt = 000

Formula Based Parameters
================================================
***WARNING: Formula parameter: rsdb/obj/max_objects = (max(2000,$(rsdb/obj/buffersize) / 4)) found in /usr/sap/D98/SYS/profile/D98_DVEBMGS00_tdssolci1d
***WARNING: Formula parameter: rtbb/buffer_length = 63000 found in /usr/sap/D98/SYS/profile/D98_DVEBMGS00_tdssolci1d
***WARNING: Formula parameter: zcsa/table_buffer_area = 140000000 found in /usr/sap/D98/SYS/profile/D98_DVEBMGS00_tdssolci1d

Parameter changes if default formulas would be used:
================================================
ES/SHM_MAX_SHARED_SEGS: 2 --> 3
ES/SHM_SEG_SIZE: 4096 --> 4184
em/address_space_MB: 7705 --> 10606
es/max_seg_size_MB: 4096 --> 4176
rsdb/ntab/entrycount: 800000 --> 878906
rsdb/ntab/ftabsize: 800000 --> 878906
rsdb/ntab/irbdsize: 160000 --> 175781
rsdb/ntab/sntabsize: 80000 --> 87891
rsdb/obj/max_objects: 192000 --> 76800
rsdb/tbi_buffer_area_MB: 216 --> 3117
rsdb/tbi_dir_entries: 50130 --> 966797
rtbb/buffer_length: 63000 --> 263672
rtbb/max_tables: 4557 --> 87891
zcsa/db_max_buftab: 45573 --> 878906
zcsa/table_buffer_area: 140000000 --> 2700000000

Additional Memory and OS Specific Checks
================================================

Shared Memory Disposition Overview
================================================
Shared memory pools
Key: 10 Pool
Size configured.....: 140000000 ( 133.5 MB)
Size min. estimated.: 137122000 ( 130.8 MB)
Advised Size........: 140000000 ( 133.5 MB)

Key: 40 Pool for database buffers
Size configured.....: 1835008000 (1750.0 MB)

Advised Size........: 1802000000 (1718.5 MB)

Key: 45 Size: 118721424 ( 113.2 MB) DB short nametab buffer

Key: 47 Size: 10343424 ( 9.9 MB) DB CUA buffer
Key: 48 Size: 2760160 ( 2.6 MB) Number range buffer

Shared memories outside of pools

Currently available maximum segment size.: 34359738368 (32768.0 MB)
R/3-imposed maximum segment size.........: 21474836480 (20480.0 MB)

Memory Space Requirements Estimated *
================================================
Shared memory....................: 13909 MB
..in pool 10: 130.8 MB ( 97% used) **
..in pool 40: 1715.0 MB ( 99% used) **
..not in pool: 12057.2 MB

ICM process .....................: 195 MB

final sizes may change

** Shared Pools are automatically
calculated by Kernel

================================================

Warnings detected................: 8
================================================

tdssolci1d:d98adm 57>
tdssolci1d:d98adm 57> cat INSTANCE.OUT
SAPup> Starting subprocess with PID 49137 in phase 'MOD_PFPAR_TRANS' at 20240731172135
ENV: DIR_LIBRARY=/usr/sap/D98/DVEBMGS00/exe
ENV: JAVA_HOME=/usr/sap/D98/DVEBMGS00/exe/sapjvm_4
ENV: LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/sap/D98/DVEBMGS00/exe:/usr/sap/D98/SYS/exe/run:/usr/sap/D98/SYS/exe/uc/linuxx86_64:/usr/sap/D98/hdbclient

SAPup> Process with PID 49137 terminated with status 1 at 20240731172136!

At first to me it seems its a memory issue but the system still have alot of memory available. Am i see this right? Appreciate the help

entry.title: CRM 7.0 EHP4 SPS update SP12 to higher: Is Preparations for the Middleware needed
entry.content:
Hi All,

For a "Support Pack Stack update" of CRM 7.0 EHP4 (NW 7.5) SP12 to higher on same EHP4 level: are the same Preparations steps for the Middleware needed like those needed for a CRM Release Upgrade?

As per SAP Guide for CRM: Upgrade and Update Guide - SAP CRM 7.0 EHP4 (URL: Upgrade and Update Guide - SAP CRM 7.0 EHP4)
Valid for ABAP, it says "You must perform this step before the upgrade downtime begins." so do all those steps (mentioned below from the guide) also apply for SPS update on same CRM 7.0 EHP4 level?

4.2 Preparations for the Middleware: -

- Deregistering CRM_SITE* Inbound Queues
- Checking the Processing of All Messages
- Checking and Stopping R&R Queues
- Deregistering R3A* Inbound Queues
- Preparing the Upgrade of Customer-Specific BDoc Types

6.2 Follow-Up Activities for the Middleware:-

- Post-Upgrade Handling of BDoc Types
- Reregistering CRM_SITE_* Queues
- Implementing an Authorization Concept for the CRM Adapter Framework
- Configuring the E-Mail ID in the MMR_CNTL Table
- Updating SAP Delivered General Filters for Existing Sites
- Regenerating Middleware Services
- Perform BDoc Merge or BDoc Structure Regeneration for Custom Modified BDoc Types
- Checking Middleware Functions (transaction MW_CHECK)
- Reregistering Inbound Queues
- Follow-Up Activities for Customer Enhancements

 

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: SAP ECC to S/4 Hana conversion
entry.content:
During the ERP to S/4 PERSON_NAME conversion, unable to do the readiness check. What notes to be implement to do readiness check


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: sql server 2008 Active/standby mode
entry.content:
We want to build SQL Server DIGITS database active/standby mode to achieve real-time synchronization of the whole database, without the need for HA, what technology can be achieved here?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Hit error when applying patch 19.24.0.0.240716 - 202408 on RedHat 8
Upgrade : SAPKB70208
entry.content:
Hello

We use Rev-Trac to import transports between our different systems. Rev-Trac, with its OOPS tool, allows us to check the consistency of data and objects. We recently encountered a problem with OOPS, which was due to a difference in package support levels.


In our ECC System, we have: 4 systems for DEV, QUAL, PreProd and Un prod.
D10, Q10, U10 and P10
In 2011: the two systems U10 and P10 have been upgraded from SAPKB70207 (Basis Support Package 07 for 7.02 Imported on 14.06.2011 )
  to SAPKB70208 and then to 
SAPKB73101 (SAP_BASIS 731: SP 0001 Imported on 16.10.2012 )
the two Dev and Quality systems did not upgrade to SAPKB70208, they have been upgraded directly from SAPKB70207 to SAPKB73101 without going through SAPKB70208 .

Can SAPKB70208 be upgraded?

entry.title: SAP SNOTE is asking for 001 clinet password
entry.content: SAP SNOTE is asking for 001 clinet password

entry.title: SUM Roadmap Error
entry.content:
We are trying to upgrade from S/4HANA 2020 to S/4HANA 2023 and we have completed the SUM Preprocessing phase. However the SUM tool is giving an odd message, "The Roadmap step Preprocessing completed successfully. You can continue with Roadmap step Reset". 

Has anyone experienced this issue? If you can provide some guidance on how to diagnose this, that too will be useful. If pre-processing is successful then the next step should be Execution and not Reset.

entry.title: SAPup process exited with status 20 while launching SUM
entry.content:
Hi 

we are working on SAP_UI component upgrade from 740 SP19 to 754 SP12. All required media files are downloaded from maintenance planner. But after lunching SUM  we are facing "SAPUP process exited with status 20".

entry.title: Problem in SUM - PREP_INPUT_CHECK/READDATA_EXP - Upgrade SAP BW System
entry.content:
Hello Support,

we want to upgrade our SAP BW System T02 to Netweaver 750 and current sp-Stack - see attached Screenshot.

In SUM we got in PREP_INPUT_CHECK/READDATA_EXP the error 

Could not find suitable DVDs for product NW required for the procedure.

The requested data carrier is not mounted on any of the mount points you entered.

Enter at least the mount point containing Export DVD for product NW.

I found note 2957413 - Incorrect DVD number in SUM phase: PREP_INPUT_CHECK/READDATA_EXP 

So I think I had to change configuration in Maintenance Planner - but I am not sure.

Can you help me out?

Best Regards

Christoph Greiner

entry.title: Are necessary to stop ASE server and replication in order to DUMP and DISK RESIZE in ASE?
entry.content:
Issue : 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

ASE @Site1
##
00:0003:00000:00025:2024/10/29 22:43:08.03 server  Error: 1105, Severity: 17, State: 2
00:0003:00000:00025:2024/10/29 22:43:08.08 server  Can't allocate space for object 'js_output' in database 'sybmgmtdb' because 'default' segment is full/has no free extents. If you ran out of space in syslogs, dump the transaction log. Otherwise, use ALTER DATABASE to increase the size of the segment.
...
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 server  Error: 1105, Severity: 17, State: 2
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 server  Can't allocate space for object 'js_history' in database 'sybmgmtdb' because 'default' segment is full/has no free extents. If you ran out of space in syslogs, dump the transaction log. Otherwise, use ALTER DATABASE to increase the size of the segment.
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 kernel  Job Scheduler (js__exec_handler): Exception 3602 raised.
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 kernel  Job Scheduler got exception for execution token 1.
##

 

Our actions for this problem: 

 

1.Take the backup of sybmgmtdb database in primary Site1 node.

 

dump database sybmgmtdb to "/path/sybmgmtdb.dmp"

 

If we run it when primary DB, application and Replication is online and running then should it be a problem ?

 

OR 

 

2.

 

Check database current log devices:

 

sp_helpdb <SID>
go

 

To resize an existing log device:

 

use master
go
disk resize name = '<existing_log_device_name>', size = '<size in GB>G'  -- size is what is being added, not the total target size of the device
go
alter database <dbname> log on <existing_log_device_name> = '<size in GB>G' 
go

 

If we run it when primary DB, application and Replication is online and running then should it be a problem ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
